heroHeadline: China Tests Deep-Sea Cable Cutting Technology at Record Depth
heroSubtitle: US exempts smartphones, computers, and chips from 145% China tariffs (still 20% fentanyl levy); China's 125% tariffs on US goods took effect April 12; FCC moves to block China Mobile/Telecom/Unicom from US data centers; DeepSeek V4 expected late April exclusively on Huawei Ascend 950PR — a potential AI self-sufficiency milestone
footerNote: Data sourced from MIIT, BIS, Bloomberg, FT, SCMP, CSET, Nikkei Asia, TechInsights, DeepSeek, Huawei Annual Reports, TrendForce, US Trade Representative, CBP, China MOFCOM
